text:
PSV Eindhoven, sports club from Eindhoven, the Netherlands, also known as Philips Sport Vereniging, PSV, Eindhoven Football Club. Attributes include: 
- named after: "Koninklijke Philips NV"
- Commons category: "Philips Sport Vereniging"
- instance of: "association football club"
- home venue: "Philips Stadion"
- league or competition: "Eredivisie (start time: 1956)"
- sport: "association football"
- participant in: "2013 KNVB Cup Final (points/goal scored by: Jürgen Locadia ; number of points/goals/set scored: +1)"
- inception: "31 Aug 1913"
- headquarters location: "Eindhoven (country: Netherlands ; street address: Stadionplein 4 ; postal code: 5616 RX)"
- country: "Netherlands"
- owner of: "De Herdgang",
 "Philips Stadion"
- child organization or unit: "Jong PSV"
- competition won: "1987–88 European Cup"
- social media followers: "+521574 (point in time: 4 Feb 2023)",
 "+287000 (point in time: 13 Apr 2025)"
- native label: "PSV"
- different from: "FC Eindhoven"
- head coach: "Peter Bosz (start time: 1 Jul 2023)"
